---
title: "Schema ER Diagrams"
output: rmarkdown::html_document
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{LinkML Schemas}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
/*
https://github.com/r-lib/pkgdown/issues/2721
Correct flex boxes from sizing based upon the largest in tabset
*/

.tab-content>.tab-pane {
  display: none;
}

.tab-content>.active {
  display: block;
}
```

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
use("nemo")
use("tidywigits")
```

ER diagrams for each tool's LinkML schema. Tools with multiple version subsets
show per-version sub-tabs.

## Tools {.tabset}

```{r er-diagrams, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
schema_paths <- sort(list.files(
  system.file("config/tools", package = "tidywigits"),
  pattern = "schema\\.yaml$",
  full.names = TRUE,
  recursive = TRUE
))
for (p in schema_paths) {
  tool <- basename(dirname(p))
  tool_title <- tools::toTitleCase(tool)
  versions <- nemo::schema_versions(p)

  if (length(versions) == 1) {
    cat("\n\n###", tool_title, "\n\n")
    cat(paste0("![](figures/", tool, "_", versions, ".svg)\n\n"))
  } else {
    cat("\n\n###", tool_title, "{.tabset}\n\n")
    for (v in versions) {
      cat("\n\n####", v, "\n\n")
      cat(paste0("![](figures/", tool, "_", v, ".svg)\n\n"))
    }
  }
}
```
